# Work Orders by Part with Cost (Rod - with multiple Parts)

```sql
use DataWarehouse
go

SELECT CO.CUSTOMER_ID 
	, wo.PART_ID
	, wo.BASE_ID
	, wo.LOT_ID
	, wo.SPLIT_ID
	, wo.SUB_ID
	, wo.DESIRED_WANT_DATE
	, wo.CLOSE_DATE
	, wo.DESIRED_QTY
	, col.UNIT_PRICE
	, ([ACT_MATERIAL_COST] + [ACT_LABOR_COST] + [ACT_BURDEN_COST] + [ACT_SERVICE_COST])/DESIRED_QTY AS AVGACTUALCOST
	, col.TOTAL_AMT_ORDERED
	, [ACT_MATERIAL_COST] + [ACT_LABOR_COST] + [ACT_BURDEN_COST] + [ACT_SERVICE_COST] AS TOTALACTUALCOST
FROM WORK_ORDER wo
inner join LIVESupplemental.dbo.tlt_parts_20190725 tlt
	on tlt.[Part Number] = wo.part_id
left outer join DEMAND_supply_link dsl
	on dsl.SUPPLY_TYPE = 'WO' 
	and dsl.SUPPLY_BASE_ID = wo.base_id
	and dsl.SUPPLY_LOT_ID = wo.lot_id
	and dsl.SUPPLY_SPLIT_ID = wo.split_id
	and dsl.SUPPLY_SUB_ID = wo.sub_id 
left outer join cust_order_line col
	on dsl.DEMAND_TYPE = 'CO'
	and dsl.DEMAND_BASE_ID = col.cust_order_id 
	and dsl.DEMAND_SEQ_NO =  col.LINE_NO
left outer join customer_order co
	on col.cust_order_id = co.id
WHERE wo.[TYPE] = 'W'
	AND DESIRED_QTY > 0
	AND WO.[STATUS] = 'C'
	and co.CREATE_DATE >= '7/1/2017'
ORDER BY PART_ID, CLOSE_DATE DESC



/*
SELECT p.ID	
	, [description]
--	, SELLING_UM
	--, CREATE_DATE
	--, EFFECTIVE_DATE
	--, DISCONTINUE_DATE
	, '' DEFAULT_UNIT_PRICE
--	, CUSTOMER_ID 
	, UDF36.STRING_VAL AS ALLOY
	, UDF37.NUMBER_VAL AS [LENGTH]
	, UDF38.NUMBER_VAL AS [WIDTH]
	, UDF39.NUMBER_VAL AS [THICKNESS]

FROM part p
LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_DEF_FIELDS UDF36
-- ALLOY
	ON UDF36.DOCUMENT_ID = p.ID
	AND UDF36.PROGRAM_ID = 'VMPRTMNT'
	AND UDF36.ID = 'UDF-0000036'
LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_DEF_FIELDS UDF39
-- THICKNESS
	ON UDF39.DOCUMENT_ID = p.ID
	AND UDF39.PROGRAM_ID = 'VMPRTMNT'
	AND UDF39.ID = 'UDF-0000039'
LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_DEF_FIELDS UDF38
-- WIDTH
	ON UDF38.DOCUMENT_ID = p.ID
	AND UDF38.PROGRAM_ID = 'VMPRTMNT'
	AND UDF38.ID = 'UDF-0000038'
LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_DEF_FIELDS UDF37
-- LENGTH
	ON UDF37.DOCUMENT_ID = p.ID
	AND UDF37.PROGRAM_ID = 'VMPRTMNT'
	AND UDF37.ID = 'UDF-0000037'
WHERE p.id in ('135W1321-3', '135W1321-4', '135W1322-3', '135W1322-4', '256A3554-1', '256A3557-5', '256A3710-7', '256A3721-2', '256A3721-3', '256A3721-4', '256A3721-5', '256A3721-6', '256A3751-3', '258T1117-6', '258T6002-1', '295W1122-2', '295W1140-2', '542W3713-11', '542W3713-33', '542W3713-9')

	,  DEFAULT_UNIT_PRICE

inner join customer_order co
on col.cust_order_Id = co.id
where CUSTOMER_ID = 'alaair'
	and co.CREATE_DATE >= '1/1/2017'

select * from part where buyer_user_id like '%alaair'
```
